seed_text: The whole universe is animated by the One Soul diffused through all
thematic_frame: Ralph Waldo Emerson — Over-Soul, Self-Reliance, Transcendentalism
aura_sensing:
sunk vinyl and gold leaf.

A low, constant hum that gets louder if you split it up. Like every little thing is breathing the same color air.

There's a no-here-is-here kind of texture to it. No edges, just a big, all-over-snuggly-sweater feel.

Blood everywhere, but it's all good blood.
